/usr/bin/c++ -g -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/NovaForgeContextTest.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/NovaForgeContextTest.dir/novaforge_context_test.cpp.o -o NovaForgeContextTest  ../../NovaForge/App/libNovaForgeApp.a ../../NovaForge/World/libNovaForgeWorld.a ../../NovaForge/Save/libNovaForgeSave.a ../../NovaForge/UI/libNovaForgeUI.a ../../Atlas/Editor/libAtlasEditor.a ../../NovaForge/Integrations/AtlasAI/libNovaForgeIntegrationAtlasAI.a ../../Atlas/Runtime/libAtlasRuntime.a ../../Atlas/Engine/libAtlasEngine.a ../../Atlas/Core/libAtlasCore.a
